variants.name: 开拓者
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择除你以外的两名玩家：他们当晚不会死亡。如果你选中了邪恶玩家，你中毒直到下个黄昏。
variants.otherNightReminder: Remove the Pathfinder's POISONED reminder token. Wake the Pathfinder. They will choose 2 players: Mark both with the Pathfinder's SAFE reminder token. Then, put the Pathfinder to sleep. If either of the Pathfinder's choices were evil, mark the Pathfinder with their POISONED reminder token.
variants.flavor: Follow the path until you're here, then take a left and pass through the treeline. Just watch out for traps, the town Trapper is quite careless.
